name: briefing-loop
description: Daily reading digest that learns your taste and can even send approved reads to Kindle.

interface.shortDescription: Daily reading digest that learns your taste
interface.longDescription: Daily reading digest that learns your taste, uses explore/exploit to mix strong fits with useful outliers, and can even send approved reads to Kindle.
defaultPrompt: Set up a briefing loop for me.
Run my reading digest and learn from my feedback.
